body.processed:
This beautifully restored 1920s Craftsman bungalow combines original character with modern amenities. Featuring original hardwood floors, built-in cabinetry, and a stunning stone fireplace in the living room.

Key Features

  • Original hardwood floors throughout
  • Updated chef's kitchen with quartz countertops
  • Finished basement with home office
  • Private backyard with mature landscaping
  • Detached two-car garage
  • Walking distance to downtown shops and restaurants

body.processed:
Enjoy stunning lake views from this contemporary two-bedroom condominium in the sought-after Lakeside Tower. Floor-to-ceiling windows flood the open living space with natural light.

Key Features

  • Panoramic lake views from every room
  • Open-concept living and dining area
  • Gourmet kitchen with stainless steel appliances
  • Private balcony overlooking the lake
  • In-unit washer and dryer
  • Building amenities include pool, gym, and concierge
body.summary: Enjoy stunning lake views from this contemporary two-bedroom condominium in the sought-after Lakeside Tower. Floor-to-ceiling windows flood the open living space with natural light.Key FeaturesPanoram

image.alt: Modern condo interior with lake view

body.processed:
A magnificent Colonial estate set on two acres of manicured grounds. This five-bedroom home offers gracious living spaces, a gourmet kitchen, and resort-style outdoor amenities.

Key Features

  • Grand foyer with sweeping staircase
  • Chef's kitchen with island and butler's pantry
  • Primary suite with sitting room and spa bath
  • Heated in-ground pool with pool house
  • Three-car attached garage
  • Home theater and wine cellar
body.summary: A magnificent Colonial estate set on two acres of manicured grounds. This five-bedroom home offers gracious living spaces, a gourmet kitchen, and resort-style outdoor amenities.Key FeaturesGrand foyer

image.alt: Stately colonial home with landscaped yard

body.processed:
Live in the heart of the arts district in this converted warehouse loft featuring soaring 14-foot ceilings, exposed brick walls, and oversized factory windows.

Key Features

  • Open floor plan with 14-foot ceilings
  • Original exposed brick and timber beams
  • Updated kitchen with concrete countertops
  • Walk-in closet and en-suite bathroom
  • One dedicated parking space
  • Pet-friendly building
